$comment: Layer A for BATCHSUM vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image: the records generator draws a per-case record count (biased toward the empty file, the single record, and the maximum) and fills each record from WS-AMT's PICTURE domain. Failures shrink by dropping records first, then simplifying values.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 BATCHSUM (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-batchsum, record-stream wrapper)
